context7.description: Library documentation lookup — use for checking Drizzle, Hono, BlockSuite, React, vanilla-extract, BullMQ, Zod, Yjs, and other dependency docs

playwright.description: Browser automation for E2E testing and UI verification — use for Playwright test development and debugging

hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' '\n' | grep -oE '\.(tsx?|css\.ts)$' > /dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; TSCONFIG=''; for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' '\n'); do case "$f" in apps/web/*|apps/web\\*) TSCONFIG='apps/web/tsconfig.json'; break;; apps/api/*|apps/api\\*) TSCONFIG='apps/api/tsconfig.json'; break;; apps/workers/*|apps/workers\\*) TSCONFIG='apps/workers/tsconfig.json'; break;; packages/shared/*|packages/shared\\*) TSCONFIG='packages/shared/tsconfig.json'; break;; packages/db/*|packages/db\\*) TSCONFIG='packages/db/tsconfig.json'; break;; packages/ai/*|packages/ai\\*) TSCONFIG='packages/ai/tsconfig.json'; break;; packages/policy/*|packages/policy\\*) TSCONFIG='packages/policy/tsconfig.json'; break;; packages/editor/*|packages/editor\\*) TSCONFIG='packages/editor/tsconfig.json'; break;; packages/connectors/*|packages/connectors\\*) TSCONFIG='packages/connectors/tsconfig.json'; break;; esac; done; if [ -n "$TSCONFIG" ] && [ -f "$TSCONFIG" ]; then echo "[hook] Running typecheck on $TSCONFIG..."; npx tsc -p "$TSCONFIG" --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; else echo '[hook] No matching tsconfig found — skipping typecheck'; fi
hooks.description: Auto-typecheck the workspace whose TS files were modified
